requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality — Bulgaria EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC、无线模块及电能质量——保加利亚电动汽车充电桩
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC、無線模組及電能質量——保加利亞電動汽車充電樁

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Bulgaria should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, commercial, or public-sector project requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards, consistent with the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU requirements for CE marking. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional requirements under RED (2014/53/EU), Bulgarian communications authority spectrum regulations, cybersecurity frameworks, and data-interface standards under AFIR for publicly accessible recharging points.
summary.zh: 在保加利亚，若充电点运营商、商业或公共部门项目要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致，符合欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU关于CE标志的要求。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据无线设备指令（2014/53/EU）、保加利亚通信管理机构频谱法规、网络安全框架及AFIR公众可访问充电点数据接口标准触发额外要求。
summary.zht: 在保加利亞，若充電點運營商、商業或公共部門項目要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量標準一致，符合歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU關於CE標誌的要求。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據無線設備指令（2014/53/EU）、保加利亞通訊管理機構頻譜法規、網絡安全框架及AFIR公眾可訪問充電點數據接口標準觸發額外要求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMCD) — mandatory for CE marking in Bulgaria
Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) — data and digital connectivity requirements for publicly accessible recharging points
Bulgarian communications authority spectrum and radio equipment requirements where applicable

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Bulgarian operators, roaming, language, currency, and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为保加利亚运营商、漫游、语言、货币和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為保加利亞運營商、漫遊、語言、貨幣和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path (including Bulgarian spectrum authority requirements), and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Bulgarian configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Where AFIR applies (publicly accessible recharging points), data access, digital connectivity, and smart-charging obligations must be addressed. Bulgarian-language UI, instructions, and documentation are expected for local operators.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终保加利亚配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径（包括保加利亚频谱主管机构要求），以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。在AFIR适用（公众可访问充电点）的情况下，须满足数据访问、数字连接和智能充电义务。当地运营商预期提供保加利亚语用户界面、说明书和文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終保加利亞配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑（包括保加利亞頻譜主管機構要求），以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。在AFIR適用（公眾可訪問充電點）的情況下，須滿足數據訪問、數碼連接和智能充電義務。當地運營商預期提供保加利亞語使用者介面、說明書和文件。

mandatory_status.target: EMC/RED compliance is mandatory for CE marking in Bulgaria; OCPP is project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, commercial, or utility-linked chargers; AFIR data obligations apply to publicly accessible recharging infrastructure
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bulgaria networked EV chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, RED compliance for wireless modules, and local communications-module requirements under Bulgarian spectrum authority rules. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 保加利亚联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、无线模块的RED合规性，以及保加利亚频谱主管机构规则下的当地通信模块要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 保加利亞聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量、無線模組的RED合規性，以及保加利亞頻譜主管機構規則下的當地通訊模組要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。
